title: FormElement
description: A single field to fill within a form. `type` is either a key to read from the data, or a special generator/composite token.

type.description: a data key to fill (e.g. "firstName"), or a special token: $file_id$, $generated_phone_number$, $generated_zip_code$, $generated_random_number$, $generated_street_address$, cityState, fullState
